name: Naver HyperCLOVA X
description: Navers bilingual (Korean + English) foundation LLM exposed through CLOVA Studio APIs for enterprise developers.

seo.title: Naver HyperCLOVA X — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Naver HyperCLOVA X: Navers bilingual (Korean + English) foundation LLM exposed through CLOVA Studio APIs for enterprise developers.

when_to_use: Building Korean-language enterprise AI on HyperCLOVA X API
Running RAG pipelines over Korean documents with CLOVA Studio
Deploying Korean AI assistant features with NAVER's hosted LLM
Accessing one of the largest Korean-language trained models

cons: Weak English benchmarks vs GPT-4 class
No open weights; full cloud dependency
review.verdict: A no-brainer for Korean-market products, but a tough sell if you need a global English-first LLM.
review.best_for: Korean enterprises and cross-border teams targeting KR users
review.not_for: Global English-only apps or teams needing open-weight LLMs

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage/metered billing, scales up and down
